stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
During flight, you receive the above failure message on the aircraft's ECAM display, what will be the effect on landing?

options.a: The aircraft will have a slightly higher airspeed on final approach, and will have a large risk of tailstrike.
options.c: The configuration must be changed, as this is not a normal configuration for landing.
options.d: A reduced landing speed due to the higher CLMAX and a different flare method must be used.
